name: Fried Rice (Chow Fun)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the bacon until lightly browned but not crunchy, then set aside.
2. Add the beaten eggs to the bacon drippings and scramble. Remove and chop very fine.
3. Add the cooked rice and fry for approximately 5 minutes, stirring constantly.
4. Add the remaining ingredients; mix well and continue cooking for 10 minutes longer.
5. Serve piping hot. NOTE: Use your favorite meats; pork, chicken, ham, beef, or shrimp, or experiment with whatever tastes good to you.
